verdict.summary: Beautiful, athletic dogs that need extensive exercise. Weimaraners are loyal companions for active owners but can develop separation anxiety. Not for couch potatoes or those who work long hours.

description.overview: The Welsh Terrier is one of the oldest terrier breeds, resembling a smaller Airedale.
description.temperament: Welsh Terriers are friendly, spirited, and intelligent. They're more easygoing than many terriers.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to eye problems and allergies.
description.exercise: Moderate to high energy. Need daily exercise and play.

verdict.summary: Friendly Welsh terriers that are more easygoing than most. Welsh Terriers are great family dogs with typical terrier spirit.

description.overview: Westies are cheerful, sturdy little terriers with distinctive white coats. They're confident, entertaining companions with big personalities.
description.temperament: Westies are happy, confident, and entertaining. They have typical terrier independence and can be stubborn. Good watchdogs.
description.health: Prone to skin allergies, Legg-Calve-Perthes disease, and jaw problems. Regular grooming helps with skin health.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Daily walks and playtime. Enjoy activities but adaptable.

not_for: Those wanting a very obedient dog
verdict.summary: Cheerful, sturdy terriers with big personalities. Westies are hypoallergenic and apartment-friendly. They're independent and can be stubborn but reward you with endless entertainment.

description.overview: The Whippet is a medium-sized sighthound that combines elegance with athleticism and a sweet temperament.
description.temperament: Whippets are gentle, affectionate couch potatoes indoors but lightning-fast athletes outside.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to eye problems and heart conditions.
description.exercise: Need daily exercise but are calm indoors. Love to run in secure areas.

best_for: Owners who can provide running time
verdict.summary: Elegant, gentle sighthounds perfect for apartments. Whippets are calm indoors but need secure areas to run. Quiet and affectionate.

description.overview: The Wire Fox Terrier is a classic British terrier that has won more Best in Show titles at Westminster than any other breed.
description.temperament: Wire Fox Terriers are confident, fearless, and full of energy. They're friendly but independent.
description.health: Prone to eye problems, hip dysplasia, and skin allergies.
description.exercise: Very high energy. Need extensive daily exercise and mental stimulation.

verdict.summary: Classic show-ring champions with terrier spirit. Wire Fox Terriers are confident and energetic - perfect for active, experienced owners.

description.overview: The Xoloitzcuintli is an ancient Mexican breed dating back 3,000 years, considered sacred by the Aztecs.
description.temperament: Xolos are loyal, calm, and affectionate with family. They're alert watchdogs but not aggressive.
description.health: Generally healthy. Hairless variety needs skin protection.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Daily walks and play sessions.

best_for: Those wanting a unique, ancient breed
verdict.summary: Ancient Aztec dogs in hairless or coated varieties. Xolos are loyal, calm companions perfect for apartments but need skin care.

description.overview: Yorkies pack a lot of personality into a tiny package. They're feisty, bossy, and full of terrier spirit—don't let their small size fool you.
description.history: Developed in Yorkshire, England during the 1800s by Scottish weavers who brought terriers south. Originally used to catch rats in textile mills.
description.temperament: Yorkies are affectionate with their owners but can be suspicious of strangers. They have big personalities and don't know they're small. Can be barky.
description.health: Prone to dental issues, hypoglycemia, luxating patella, and collapsed trachea. Regular dental care and careful handling important.
description.grooming: High maintenance coat requiring daily brushing and regular professional grooming. Many owners opt for shorter 'puppy cuts.'
description.exercise: Low to moderate exercise needs. Short walks and indoor play. Good for apartments but still need daily activity.

not_for: Those wanting a rugged outdoor dog
verdict.summary: Yorkies are feisty, portable companions perfect for city living. They need regular grooming but don't shed much. Best for adults without young children who enjoy pampering a tiny but spirited companion.
